summary: Verified first-visit GUIDED 'seal your fate' ritual on Fork·Fate. All 6 requested scenarios pass: fresh-visit overlay renders with correct testids, step progression Food -> Location (ZIP 10001, radius=25mi) -> Chips (Italian chip visible & selectable) -> Seal (via Surprise me), Back navigates to previous step, sealing flips card, dismisses overlay, runs shuffle and shows spin-result-card (Longo Bros, Italian, near 10001). localStorage 'ff_ritual_done' set to '1' after both seal and skip paths; overlay does NOT reappear on reload in either flow.
critical_code_review_comments: GuidedFlow.jsx: seal() uses fixed 1100ms setTimeout for flip animation before onSeal — reasonable, but result relies on race with parent shuffle animation (~2.7s). Currently works, but a callback-on-animation-complete would be more robust.
Home.jsx line 106: fallback catch returns false — meaning if localStorage throws, the guided flow will NOT show. Consider returning true so ritual still runs when storage is blocked.
GuidedFlow.jsx cuisine chip testid uses raw cuisine string (e.g., 'guided-chip-Chicken Wings' contains a space) — works but non-standard for test selectors.
seed_data_creation: None. Used live Google Places for ZIP 10001.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To retest first-visit guided flow: run localStorage.removeItem('ff_ritual_done') then page.reload() before assertions. Selectors: guided-flow, guided-step-interest/location/chips/seal, guided-interest-{food|drinks|bars|desserts}, guided-zip-input, guided-radius-slider, guided-radius-value, guided-location-next, guided-chip-{Cuisine}, guided-surprise-me, guided-chips-next, guided-seal-button, guided-back, guided-skip. spin-result-card appears ~2.7s after seal.
